creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

1. Ports are not supposed to work on a partially outdated tree. Update 
the complete tree and use portupgrade or similar tools to build ports in 
right order.  2. The autoconf dependency will go away with the next 
update which is going to happen today or tomorrow, because the related 
fixes has been merged upstream.  3. Consider moving from 5.x since it's 
not supported by ports tree.
